recommendations.title: Divine Secrets of the Ya-Ya Sisterhood
recommendations.overview: In a sleepy Louisiana parish, a group of lifelong friends stage a rather unorthodox intervention to help a young playwright unravel the truth about her complicated mother and let go of her painful past.

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: A woman's chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmother's dog.

recommendations.title: Being Charlie
recommendations.overview: Charlie is a troublesome 18-year-old who breaks out of a youth drug treatment clinic, but when he returns home to Los Angeles, he's given an intervention by his parents and forced to go to an adult rehab. There, he meets a beautiful but troubled girl

recommendations.title: Angel Falls Christmas
recommendations.overview: A devoted doctor with little time for the Christmas spirit is in desperate need of an intervention from the unlikeliest of places.

recommendations.title: 28 Days
recommendations.overview: After getting into a car accident while drunk on the day of her sister's wedding, Gwen Cummings is given a choice between prison or a rehab center. She chooses rehab, but is extremely resistant to taking part in any of the treatment programs they hav

recommendations.title: Premam
recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

recommendations.title: Rachel Getting Married
recommendations.overview: A young woman who has been in and out from rehab for the past 10 years returns home for the weekend for her sister's wedding.

recommendations.title: Jim Jefferies: Freedumb
recommendations.overview: Returning for a second Netflix comedy special, Jim Jefferies unleashes his famously ferocious black humor to a packed house in Nashville, Tennessee.

recommendations.title: Vacation Friends
recommendations.overview: When a straight-laced couple that has fun with a rowdy couple on vacation in Mexico return to the States, they discover that the crazy couple they met in Mexico followed them back home and decide to play tricks on them.

recommendations.title: Why Stop Now?
recommendations.overview: When a college piano prodigy tries to check his mother into rehab, he is taken hostage by her drug dealer and swept along on a wild adventure.
